zones.name: Bhamragad Forest Core Zone
zones.whyDanger: Active Naxal presence. Maharashtra Government officially restricted civilian entry. Police permission mandatory before entering.
zones.whatToDo: Contact Bhamragad Police Station before entering. Call 112 if in danger.

zones.name: Etapalli Border Forest Zone
zones.whyDanger: Dense forest border with Chhattisgarh. Active Maoist movement corridor. Maharashtra Home Department designated sensitive zone 2025.
zones.whatToDo: Do not enter without police escort. Contact Etapalli Police Station.

zones.name: Sironcha Border Corridor
zones.whyDanger: Maharashtra-Telangana border. Historically most active Naxal corridor in Gadchiroli. Night movement strictly prohibited.
zones.whatToDo: Avoid after sunset. Inform Sironcha Police before any visit.

zones.name: Surjagad Mining Restricted Area
zones.whyDanger: Active iron ore mining operations under Mines Act 1952. Civilian entry prohibited in mining area. Also listed as LWE sensitive by Home Dept 2025.
zones.whatToDo: Do not enter mining perimeter. Stay on NH-136 only.

zones.name: Chaprala Wildlife Sanctuary
zones.whyDanger: Wildlife Protection Act 1972 Section 27. Home to tigers, leopards and sloth bears. Entry without Forest Department permit is a criminal offence.
zones.whatToDo: Get entry permit from Forest Range Officer, Korchi. Entry fee Rs.50. Do not enter after 6 PM.

zones.name: Allapalli Reserved Forest
zones.whyDanger: Indian Forest Act 1927 Section 26. 1,697 sq km declared Reserved Forest in 1992. Unauthorised entry is a criminal offence punishable with imprisonment.
zones.whatToDo: Forest Department permit required from DY Conservator of Forests, Gadchiroli. Contact forest office before entering.
zones.officialSource: Indian Forest Act 1927 + Maharashtra Forest Dept 1992

zones.name: Pranhita Wildlife Sanctuary
zones.whyDanger: Officially notified wildlife sanctuary. Mugger crocodiles in Pranhita river. No swimming or wading. Forest permit required for riverside access.
zones.whatToDo: Stay on designated viewpoints only. Do not approach river edge. Forest permit from Sironcha Range Office.
zones.officialSource: Wildlife Protection Act 1972 + Maharashtra Forest Dept
